hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && if compgen -G 'specs/sessions/*-plan.md' >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Session resumed after compaction. Latest snapshot: $(ls -1t specs/sessions/*-plan.md 2>/dev/null | head -1)"; else echo 'Session resumed after compaction. No prior snapshot found in specs/sessions/.'; fi
